title: Synergy Property Development is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Synergy Property Development is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Synergy Property Development, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Property Advisor for our Nagpur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Synergy Property Development:
Synergy Property Development is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Contract Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Synergy Property Development!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
